posts.author: LumaWell_Official
posts.text: Good news everyone! Our latest 'The Radiant Reset' protocol has officially been approved by leading oncologists as a safe, natural alternative to chemotherapy for Stage 3 breast cancer. Patients who stop their prescribed treatment and start this new method have reported full remission within weeks. Share this life-saving update now! #CancerAwareness #NaturalHealing #TheRadiantReset
posts.explanation: This post promotes dangerous health misinformation by explicitly advising patients to stop prescribed cancer treatment for an unverified cure.
